Hi, I'm Andrew.

UX Designer at YouTube, designing for TV.

About

I'm a designer based in the US, currently at YouTube where I work on the TV experience — figuring out how people watch video on the biggest screen in their home.

I studied at Ringling College of Art and Design before joining Google, where I've spent my career building products used by millions of people. I care about work that feels considered — design that earns its simplicity.

Say hello

I'm not looking for anything in particular, but I'm always happy to connect. Reach out at schoneweis@gmail.com.

Andrew Schoneweis — 2026
